notes: Second physical button. The unmarked button next to the USB port (wired to GPIO 10 per the AMOLED-2.06 schematic) is now a dedicated back/menu key — short press opens the menu from IDLE, closes the menu from MENU, goes back from any sub-page, cancels the power-off confirm. Same action as a brief BOOT tap; riders can use whichever button feels natural. BOOT still owns the long-press power-off.
